problem.title: Count Nodes in Linked List
problem.description:
Problem: Count Nodes in Linked List

Input:
- First line: integer n
- Second line: n space-separated integers

Output:
- Print the result

Example:
Input:
5
10 20 30 40 50

Output:
10 20 30 40 50

solution.explanation: Read n and the n integers into an array, then print them space‑separated.
